PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added --checkout/--apply to edit docs and notes as files, plus auto-sync/reconcile hooks

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: bumped to fusekit v0.21.0 for holder come-up and dropped the dead -tags fuse build variant, going fully pure-Go

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pushback.summary: migrated to spawnllm 0.5's run/call/extract API with a structured Response, and tuned the judge prompt to v5

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: collapsed repo-bootstrap's PyPI template onto a release-pypi.yml@pypi-v1 caller with opt-in maturin

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-squash.summary: wired the proxy to reversibly squash tool output and calibrate the live cache-economics engine

PushEvent:yasyf/cookiesync.summary: enumerated each host's browser profiles over ssh atop the Browsers + shared Hosts TUI

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: threaded ExecPath into the holder probe and made mount teardown graceful-only with a more lenient liveness check

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: rolled the latest cask and formula bumps for reposync, cookiesync, and synckitd

PushEvent:yasyf/reposync.summary: bumped to synckit v0.4.2 for Hosts-tab seed + revalidate, on top of the shared-TUI adoption

PushEvent:yasyf/synckit.summary: seeded the Hosts tab from the registered mesh and revalidated in place, sorting registered hosts first

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: added unattended `just redeploy` + a `just onboard` TUI and hardened the metal daemon boot for reboot self-heal

captain-hook@v4.2.0.summary: added SessionStore.once/unseen for keyed session dedup and a commit= diff source

cc-pool@v0.34.1.summary: re-blinded the overlay onto fusekit's concrete backends and consumed its RetirePolicy for holder skew-replace

fusekit@v0.22.1.summary: threaded ExecPath into Select's holder-probe Spawn

slop-cop@v0.1.24.summary: collapsed CI onto the unified release-go.yml@v1 with codesign and auto-tag

spawnllm@v0.5.2.summary: seeded an isolated CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR per run
